aspects.label: Caution
aspects.driver_action: Proceed, prepare to stop at next signal

aspects.label: Attention
aspects.meaning: Next signal is at Caution (double yellow)

types.label: Distant Signal
types.description: Pre-warns driver of upcoming stop signal aspect. Located ~1 km before first stop signal.

types.label: Home Signal
types.description: Controls entry into station limits. First stop signal approaching a station.

types.label: Starter Signal
types.description: Controls departure from station. Marks the limit of train advance within station.

types.label: Advanced Starter
types.description: Permits entry into block section ahead. Last signal before leaving station limits.
